user_feedback:
a lot of the upgrades don't seem to show up visually or even at all, can you make sure all of the upgrades visually shown and actual show up in general. 

also, the levels may be too hard, decrease the amount of kills required and descrease the speed of the enemies and the spawn rate
analysis:
- Issue identified: Players cannot visually verify active upgrades, and the game difficulty is too high (too many kills required, enemies too fast and spawn too frequently).
- Files affected: `globals.js` (difficulty config), `entities.js` (enemy speeds), `rendering.js` (UI display).
- Changes needed: 
    1.  Update `STAGE_CONFIG` in `globals.js` to reduce `killsRequired` and increase `spawnRate` (frames between spawns).
    2.  Reduce enemy movement speeds in `entities.js`.
    3.  Update `drawUI` in `rendering.js` to display all active player stats (Damage, Fire Rate, Speed, Max Health, Regen) so upgrades are clearly visible.
